prompt: This document is to be published on the UK GOV.UK government website. It may apply to one or more of the nations of the UK (England, Wales, Scotland or Northern Ireland). State whether it applies to England and give a short explanation (less than 100 words) for your decision.
reason: This document specifically pertains to the water quality monitoring conducted by the Environment Agency in England, focusing on the baselines and pollution levels of rivers in the Kent and Leven catchment area, and it references regulations set forth by the UK government applicable to England.
